title: NABA ACAP Summer Camp
description: I attended ACAP's summer camp at Santa Clara University of California, where I learned about college life, met professors, and made connections with students, business professionals, and counselors.

title: Business Pitch Competition
description: Over the week, I worked with a team to create a business pitch for an energy drink company. We created a business plan, marketing strategy, and financial projections, and presented our pitch to a panel of judges.

title: KPMG
description: We had the oppurtunity to meet with KPMG professionals, who shared their experiences and insights about the accounting and consulting industry. We also learned about the different career paths in accounting and consulting, and how to prepare for a successful career in these fields.

title: Mr O'Garro
description: Mr O'Garro was the lead instructor for the ACAP summer camp, and he shared his experiences and insights about accounting, consulting, and business. He also provided guidance and mentorship to the students, and helped us develop our skills and knowledge in these fields.

title: Certified
description: This is the certificate I received for completing the ACAP summer camp, which demonstrates my commitment to learning and developing my skills in accounting, consulting, and business.
